relics.name: Miss.Christine Petting Ticket
relics.desc: You have the lady's permission!
relics.usage: Immediately Promote 2 Operators (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Red Bow Tie
relics.desc: The first present Phantom gave Miss.Christine. She is really fond of it.
relics.usage: Hope +2, Deployment Limit +1

relics.name: Solo Music Box
relics.desc: An old music box. The music does not play when the box is opened, nor does the figure inside show any signs it is about to move. There is not a peep, and no one is breaking out in dance. Before she begins her performances with Phantom, the lead actress stares blankly into the music box.
relics.usage: Hope +4, Deployment Limit +1

relics.name: Supreme Ring
relics.desc: In Leithanian mythology, he who holds the ring enjoys the vast riches of the entire world, but greed will also be his undoing.
relics.usage: +50% Originium Ingot drops from battle

relics.name: Lucky Coin
relics.desc: A coin picked up at Rhodes Island. If you find one, you're sure to be able to find many more.
relics.usage: Gain +2 Originium Ingots upon entering a non-combat node.

relics.name: Leithanian Medal of Honor
relics.desc: The twin empresses rarely do anything together, but conferring awards on those who create art is one such thing.
relics.usage: Gain +30% Command EXP from battles

relics.name: Hibernating Kin
relics.desc: Lost in the silver mountain range, the Sarkaz hibernated for self-preservation. It slept so long it nearly lost itself, until its fated kin awoke it. Now, it will follow his path.
relics.usage: Hope +5, obtain an extra Collectible when this Collectible is exchanged in Lost and Found

relics.name: Extra-Pungent Coffee Beans
relics.desc: Coffee beans fed to a rare, peculiar-smelling fowlbeast and processed from its excrement. The unique aroma from gastric acid fermentation triples the beans' price.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +1, Deployment Limit +1, Shield +1

relics.name: Blue Silk Scarf
relics.desc: A lady's elegant scarf. Her appearance is a sign that it is safe here.
relics.usage: Hope +2, Squad Size Limit +1

relics.name: Originium Iris
relics.desc: A most extravagant bouquet of flowers. The troupe leader has handed flowers like these to the leads during countless curtain calls.
relics.usage: Hope +6, Squad Size Limit +2

relics.name: Weird Flute
relics.desc: A weird-looking flute. Someone plays it day in and day out.
relics.usage: Hope +4, Squad Size Limit +1

relics.name: Glass Bird
relics.desc: 'In this paradise of mine, the bird will sing forever and ever.'
relics.usage: Hope +4, Squad Size Limit +1

relics.name: Pure Gold Expedition
relics.desc: The regent departed from the wastelands, and markets rose from beneath her dress like sprouts budding in the spring. The road of prosperity connected high mountains and dense forests, following her until she disappeared beyond the cliffs overlooking the western waves. —Ancient Sargon Fairy Tale
relics.usage: Hope +4, Squad Size Limit +1, Deployment Limit +1

relics.name: 'Durin Overground'
relics.desc: In this expedition account, we get a glimpse of how those who live underground see those who live on the surface.
relics.usage: Shield +4

relics.name: 'Gaulish Toponym Origins'
relics.desc: A book of historical place names that Mint dug out of the Doctor's office. Calais-blason is mentioned in the book.
relics.usage: Shield +6

relics.name: Hot Water Kettle
relics.desc: Some people regularly use the water boiler in the Rhodes Island office to cook instant noodles in the middle of the night. That's not a very healthy lifestyle...
relics.usage: Max Life Point +1, Hope +1

relics.name: Special Suppressor
relics.desc: An enhanced suppressor developed by Rhodes Island that can better keep the Infected from losing control of their Originium Arts.
relics.usage: Max Life Point +2, recover 2 Life Points

relics.name: Stone Gargoyle
relics.desc: A palm-sized sculpture. Supposedly these are handmade gifts given out by the Gargoyles as a sign of friendship.
relics.usage: Max Life Point +3

relics.name: Vampire's Bed
relics.desc: A lavish-looking coffin that matches the castle's aesthetics well. However, Warfarin says this is merely a stereotype.
relics.usage: Max Life Point +4

relics.name: Proof of Longevity
relics.desc:
A tree branch that has withered and flourished.
When it is withered, it grows anew. When it is thriving in its fullest, it fades away yet again.
relics.usage: Max Life Point +6

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Training
relics.desc: A formidable set of equipment to provide strength, an indomitable heart to press forward bravely.
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Vanguard Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Bend Spears - Training
relics.desc: Some people use swords because they don't know how to use crossbows or Arts. Others use swords because that's all they need.
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Guard Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Iron Guard - Training
relics.desc: Scars symbolize glory, but who will remember the soldiers who were cut a bit too deeply?
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Defender Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Training
relics.desc: 'Either you learn to control your fire power, or you learn to discern your target. Got it?'
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Sniper Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Broken Wand - Training
relics.desc: 'After watching the 'performance' of certain casters, I decided to quietly put away the Leithanian textbook.'
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Caster Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Training
relics.desc: Their tactics are always diverse and colorful.
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Supporter Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Healer's Path - Training
relics.desc: When the day comes when everyone is a doctor and can even cure the disease known as life, we will no longer need doctors.
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Medic Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Rusted Blade - Training
relics.desc: When conducting live combat drills with Specialist Operators, please be prepared to be 'beaten up thoroughly before you are prepared.'
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Specialist Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Acahuallan Bowl
relics.desc: Fruit is one of the locals' staples, often eaten fresh right off the tree.
relics.usage: Recover 4 Life Points, Shield +2

relics.name: Defender-2
relics.desc: A mass-produced defensive drone, oddly effective only in the hands of the enemy.
relics.usage: +3 Shield

relics.name: Victorian 'Scrap' Medal
relics.desc: A knight's medal that Siege threw together and awarded to Dagda on the spot. The materials used are pitiful, but it holds a lot of meaning to Dagda.
relics.usage: Gain +20% Command EXP from battles

relics.name: Bag of Plans
relics.desc: Ideas like 'build a bridge here', 'grow flowers there', or 'blow this wall open' are perfect for sitting inside bags so they can be easily retrieved when needed.
relics.usage: Immediately obtain 3 Plans

relics.name: Gift of Remembrance
relics.desc: Water from the Convallis that never loses its shimmer, personally bottled by Laqeramaline Duqa Convalliss days after the miracle. The 'tear-weaving Convallis Hostess' happily gifted these vials to her dear ones.
relics.usage: Toil Limit +5

relics.name: Cursed War Chronicles
relics.desc: Hidden in the deepest corner of the library, this war chronicle ensnares hapless readers with its countless battles and campaigns, unraveling their minds as they resist. Eventually, the elder revenant tore out the rogue revenant in the book and sealed it in his bones.
relics.usage: Toil Limit +2; Toil Limit +1 after each perfectly cleared battle

relics.name: Lost Key
relics.desc: 'Fellas, this key can open the treasure trove lost within the royal city of Kazdel. Hey, green-haired Feline! Watch that hooded slave of yours and keep those hands away from my map!'
relics.usage: Gain +20% Command EXP from battles; obtain 50 Originium Ingots upon reaching Command Level 10

relics.name: Nameless Totem
relics.desc: This totem once stood at a crossroads, where those who approached would trample the vague outline of a revenant until their feet bled and they died from exhaustion. Eventually, the elder revenant shattered the token with a stomp and sealed the rogue revenant in his bones.
relics.usage: Obtain 3 different Thoughts

relics.name: Revenant Remnant
relics.desc: To be a wandering ghost without a body. This is the price some Sarkaz willingly paid to ensure the future of their race.
relics.usage: Hope +2, refresh count at each Node +1

relics.name: Magic Box
relics.desc: This ordinary looking box devours souls, compelling those who see it to kill its owner and claim it. When all the humans had killed each other, animals became the new victims. Eventually, the elder revenant retrieved the box from a giant rockhorn's stomach and sealed the rogue revenant in his bones.
relics.usage: Originium Ingots +4 and Toil Limit +2

relics.name: Half-Eaten Candy
relics.desc: 'With every piece of candy I eat, I feel like I'm losing a part of my body. But I still want to eat more, and more... until that black shadow showed up and ripped away the monster inside me. But that hollow in my mind will never be filled.'
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +1, Toil Limit +2

relics.name: Assault Co-op - Sharp Blade
relics.desc: Use the sharpest spear to strike the hardest shield. I guarantee you that the shield will break first, trust me.
relics.usage: Increases the ATK of Vanguard and Guard Operators by +8% for each Vanguard or Guard Operator in the combat squad.

relics.name: Assault Co-op - Skirmish
relics.desc: A sophisticated blocking technique is essential to protecting one's body.
relics.usage: Increases the DEF of Vanguard and Guard Operators by +10% for each Vanguard or Guard Operator in the combat squad.

relics.name: Fortification Co-op - Phalanx
relics.desc: Like a huge ship running over rubble.
relics.usage: Increases the ATK of Defender and Supporter Operators by +8% for each Defender or Supporter Operator in the combat squad

relics.name: Fortification Co-op - Resolution
relics.desc: Use the hardest shield to block the sharpest spear. I guarantee you that the spear will break first, trust me.
relics.usage: Increases the DEF of Defender and Supporter Operators by +10% for each Defender or Supporter Operator in the combat squad.

relics.name: Ranged Co-op - Remote Strike
relics.desc: If you can solve the problem from a reasonable distance, why do you have to literally butt heads?
relics.usage: Increases the ATK of Medic and Sniper Operators by +8% for each Medic or Sniper Operator in the combat squad

relics.name: Ranged Co-op - Assassination
relics.desc: Can't tell friends from foes at this distance? Unload a volley at them then. The enemies are the ones who failed to avoid it.
relics.usage: Increases the ASPD of Medic and Sniper Operators by +6 for each Medic or Sniper Operator in the combat squad.

relics.name: Sabotage Co-op - Elimination
relics.desc: External destruction, internal disintegration.
relics.usage: Increases the ATK of Caster and Specialist Operators by +8% for each Caster or Specialist Operator in the combat squad.

relics.name: Sabotage Co-op - Suppression
relics.desc: Don't worry about accuracy. Take enough shots, and you're guaranteed to land something!
relics.usage: Increases the ASPD of Caster and Specialist Operators by +6 for each Caster or Specialist Operator in the combat squad.

relics.name: Fissured Restraints
relics.desc: It seems this sturdy band was once used to restrain something terrifying... Help...
relics.usage: All enemy units have -7% ATK

relics.name: Abyssal Wyrdmask
relics.desc: An eldritch mask not belonging to any culture you're familiar with, capable of making people lose their will to fight... and unconsciously fall into a state of deep contemplation.
relics.usage: All enemy units have -12% ATK

relics.name: Godmother's Token
relics.desc: A laurel of bones, the token of Signora Sicilia. This symbol of order will smooth the turbulence of all desires, for conflict is not allowed. Genuine or counterfeit, it still demands you to kneel.
relics.usage: All enemy units have -17% ATK

relics.name: Worn-out Group Photo
relics.desc: Do you know someone in the photo?
relics.usage: All enemy units have -12% DEF

relics.name: Sea Terror Jerky
relics.desc: When the will to survive outweighs fear, famished Iberians will consume this 'food', only to turn into Sea Terror in one of the days that follow.
relics.usage: All enemy units have -21% DEF

relics.name: Rosmontis's Embrace
relics.desc: 'Who will be the judge?'
relics.usage: All enemy units have -30% DEF

relics.name: Gold-Plated Die
relics.desc: The gold-plated die has one side representing life. As for the other nineteen sides...
relics.usage: All enemy units have -15% HP

relics.name: 'The Whisperer in Darknight'
relics.desc: A black vinyl. DO. NOT. TOUCH. IT.
relics.usage: All enemy units have -10% HP

relics.name: 'The Silence'
relics.desc: A painting that depicts the greatest disaster in Iberian history. Its brushstrokes, colors, and images are all meaningless. 'The Ægir know. The Ægir know. The Ægir know.'
relics.usage: All enemy units have -20% HP

relics.name: Oriron Round Shield
relics.desc: Before the use of Oriron became widespread in today's industrial sector, the material was frequently used to forge military weapons like this one.
relics.usage: All allied units have +15% DEF

relics.name: Military Mirror Armor
relics.desc: This mirror armor used to be able to withstand most attacks to the chest, but with the fall of Gaul, such archaic forms of armor have become museum pieces.
relics.usage: All allied units have +25% DEF

relics.name: Old Steam Armor
relics.desc: Even this old, outdated steam armor seems to carry with it the resplendence of when the Victorian monarchs cast their glory across half the world.
relics.usage: All allied units have +35% DEF

relics.name: Emperor's Favor
relics.desc: A very sharp letter opener. It was one of the favorite possessions of the last Ursus emperor, and as such it was very rarely used to actually open letters.
relics.usage: All allied melee units have +15% ATK

relics.name: Royal Rapier
relics.desc: A highly decorative rapier for nobles. Used by Gaulish nobles first and foremost, though perhaps a little fragile for a military weapon.
relics.usage: All allied melee units have +25% ATK

relics.name: Vieux Vanguard's Blade
relics.desc: Prior to its downfall, Gaul first witnessed the sacrifices of its Vieux Vanguards.
relics.usage: All allied melee units have +35% ATK

relics.name: Necklace of the Presence
relics.desc: Faith hangs ten centimeters above your heart, spoken words flow into your blood, and bullets slide into your magazine.
relics.usage: All allied ranged units have +15% ATK

relics.name: Silver Forks
relics.desc: One for dealing with actors who botch their performances, one for dealing with incompetent playwrights, and one for anyone who needs it. The Chief will not tolerate any mistakes on the table.
relics.usage: All allied ranged units have +25% ATK

relics.name: Damaged Revolver Cylinder
relics.desc: She never capitulated, even after enduring countless trials and tribulations. Her muzzle belched tongues of flame that burned like an angry sun, and the glow above her head was brighter than the daylight itself. Buried here is Outcast, our friend.
relics.usage: All allied ranged units have +35% ATK

relics.name: Noxious Hemostatic Agent
relics.desc: 'After fermentation, the body fluids of this Originium slug can be used to stop bleeding.' —'Rhodes Island Wilderness Survival Guide'
relics.usage: All allied units have +20% HP

relics.name: First Aid Kit
relics.desc: '...Please use antibiotics and ethanol additives under the supervision of professionals...' —Rim Billiton Production Safety Manual
relics.usage: All allied units have +35% HP

relics.name: Unknown Instrument
relics.desc: Don't ask. It's for your own good.
relics.usage: All allied units have +50% HP

relics.name: Rusted Razor
relics.desc: If you cut yourself with this, you know what will happen.
relics.usage: All enemies take +15% Physical damage

relics.name: Carriage Driver's Whip
relics.desc: As the troupe's carriage driver, he has no name and no past. His life is meaningful only when he whips his burdenbeasts.
relics.usage: All enemies take +25% Physical damage

relics.name: 'Hateful Avenger'
relics.desc: A gift from Theresis and set up by Theresa, this is the very first weapon that Ascalon received after her inaugural mission as part of the Military Council.
relics.usage: All enemies take +35% Physical damage

relics.name: Standard Anti-Riot Instrument
relics.desc: Standard equipment of the Ursus Guard. Comes with an intermittent blinding Originium Arts effect. Unfortunately, not many Guards out there remember this when push comes to shove.
relics.usage: All enemies take +20% Arts damage

relics.name: Emperor's Collection
relics.desc: The Sami revere their wild lands more than anything, and this fragment of the vast wilderness sleeps in the personal collection of the Emperor of Ursus.
relics.usage: All enemies take +30% Arts damage

relics.name: 'Brilliant Lament'
relics.desc: His blood yet flows. He has never left this place.
relics.usage: All enemies take +40% Arts damage

relics.name: Live Rose
relics.desc: Is it you who nourishes her, or is it her who protects you?
relics.usage: All allied units have +20% healing effectiveness

relics.name: White Flower Crown
relics.desc: A floral veil used in Vampire rituals. Its once vibrant redness has been sucked empty, leaving only a pale white color.
relics.usage: All allied units have +30% healing effectiveness

relics.name: Actor's Perfume
relics.desc: Troupe actors put this on before going onstage. Stable yet aromatic fragrances like this can help them ease pressure. That's how it seems on the surface, at least.
relics.usage: All allied units recover 1% of Max HP per second

relics.name: Designer's Ruler
relics.desc: Carefully measured with data and experience, those who wear this armor are known to be several magnitudes luckier.
relics.usage: All allied units have +15% Physical Dodge

relics.name: 'Arts Killer'
relics.desc: Considering how Originium Arts and music go hand in hand in Leithanien, it's quite amazing someone came up with the bright idea of combating Arts with noise like this.
relics.usage: All allied units have +15% Arts Dodge

relics.name: Dancer's Bracelets
relics.desc: The audience breaks into applause as the well-trained dancers waltz around the traps on stage. None of them are aware of the brushes with death the performers have just been through.
relics.usage: All allied units have +10% Physical and Arts Dodge

relics.name: Doll House
relics.desc: Every kid needs at least one set.
relics.usage: Starting DP +10

relics.name: Miniature Stage Model
relics.desc: The red paint has not yet dried. Careful. Don't get that paint on your hand.
relics.usage: Starting DP +20

relics.name: Dreambind Castle Model
relics.desc: You've seen this place, and you once wandered the castle, yet you now hold it in your hand. Is this real, or is it all a dream?
relics.usage: Starting DP +30

relics.name: Jet-Black Dance Shoes
relics.desc: The Columbian dancer's steps are firm and strong, her taps reverberating loudly in the air as she strikes the ground.
relics.usage: Can deploy Melee Operators on High Ground tiles

relics.name: Pure White Dance Shoes
relics.desc: The Ursus dancer's steps are swift and elegant, her body moving as she wills.
relics.usage: Can deploy Ranged Operators on Low Ground tiles

relics.name: Ancient Gaulish Silver Coin
relics.desc: A coin once circulated in the now fallen nation of 'Gaul.' It is in very good shape, making it highly valuable as a collector's item.
relics.usage: All Operators start with +6 SP

relics.name: Bank of Gaul Check
relics.desc: An extravagant checkbook plated in gold and silver. Can no longer be cashed.
relics.usage: All Operators start with +12 SP

relics.name: 'Second Economic Reform Act'
relics.desc: With this bill as the starting point, Gaul formally began its path to become a hegemonic empire.
relics.usage: All Operators start with +18 SP

relics.name: Vanilla Soda
relics.desc: Bolívar's cheap specialty drink dates back hundreds of years. It is mixed with a variety of spices, and is known for not being very good.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Auto Recovery skills by +0.2/s

relics.name: Fowlbeast Liver Pate
relics.desc: A small jar of fowlbeast liver pâté. Bright and vividly colorful, it is eaten only by nobles.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Auto Recovery skills by +0.35/s

relics.name: Dreaming Essence
relics.desc: Supposedly the Banshees make their aromatics only for their beloved. A single drop is enough to enchant just about anyone, bringing out any artist's inspiration and creativity.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Auto Recovery skills by +0.5/s

relics.name: Captain Morgan's Wine
relics.desc: A wine produced in the Iberian region. Despite having gained popularity in the heart of Victoria's bustling cities, it is now discontinued.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Offensive and Defensive Recovery skills by 1 SP per 3s

relics.name: Water of Life
relics.desc: The strongest Ursine liquors go straight to one's head, but it's said that the healthy Ursine adult can down several bottles.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Offensive and Defensive Recovery skills by 1 SP per 2.5s

relics.name: Royal Liqueur
relics.desc: The fine wines of the fallen nation of Gaul have now become prized treasures for collectors. The place of production has moved to Leithanien, but the technique has been lost.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Offensive and Defensive Recovery skills by 1 SP per 1.5s

relics.name: String Puppet
relics.desc: The more you struggle and try to break free, the tighter the strings get. Do you really think you are still thinking rationally?
relics.usage: Enemies receive 700 Arts damage per second when stunned, frozen, or bound

relics.name: 'Children's Puppet'
relics.desc: A simple puppet made by Iberian children using trinkets found on the seacoast. Supposedly just holding it tight will give you much richer dreams.
relics.usage: Enemies receive 1000 Arts damage per second when stunned, frozen, or bound

relics.name: Victory Horn
relics.desc: Blow the horn, cry out, and scatter our foes with its roar!
relics.usage: Increases the duration of single-instance status effects such as stun, cold, or freeze by 100%

relics.name: Flash Camera
relics.desc: Every photo shot by this camera is washed out in white, with only the victim's twisted expression faintly visible.
relics.usage: Increases the duration of single-instance status effects such as stun, cold, or freeze by 110%

relics.name: Therapy Tape
relics.desc: He tried to stop you from listening. He said it was dangerous. He said you should not stay. Do you understand now? You are listening to his song.
relics.usage: Increases the duration of single-instance status effects such as stun, cold, or freeze by 150%

relics.name: Old Fan
relics.desc: When it rains for several days on end, the old Yanese Tianshi complains to his friends about the pain in his knees, before casually waving his fan and driving away the rainclouds. It is about time he taught this trick to his young apprentice, currently working at the Central Judicial Office.
relics.usage: All Operators gain +10% ATK for every different type of Operator class in the squad

relics.name: Scout's Scope
relics.desc: Lock on, aim, fire, and destroy the enemy's will to resist, all in the name of a better future that Scout will never see. Maybe you can do it for him.
relics.usage: Enemies take increased damage from allied units as range increases (max 100%)

relics.name: Black Tulip
relics.desc: Silence crushed the Iberians, so she knows she must speak up. If her words aren't sharp enough, her sword will speak for her.
relics.usage: Allied Operators gradually gain ATK when not using a skill, up to a maximum of +60% after 60 seconds; bonus is reset when skill ends

relics.name: Spinach Pack
relics.desc: Many Cautus out there believe that popping the contents of this can into their mouths will grant them immense strength. The marketing's effectiveness is a classic success story in the industry.
relics.usage: Operators have +60% ATK for one second after their skill becomes active

relics.name: Wrath of Siracusans
relics.desc: The signature pasta dish of an 'authentic Siracusan restaurant' that once operated in the capital of Gaul. The dish's unique taste, and particularly its sauce—a blend of thick chocolate sauce and Originium Slug liver—earned the praise of many Gaulish nobles. Supposedly, though, this dish nearly caused a diplomatic crisis between Siracusa and Gaul.
relics.usage: Operators have +100% ATK for one second after their skill becomes active

relics.name: Castle's Offspring
relics.desc: With enough time, this box will become a whole new stage.
relics.usage: All Operators gain +300 DEF and +30 RES after being deployed for 100 seconds

relics.name: 'Glorious Kazimierz'
relics.desc: A Kazimierzian best-seller that adapts the deeds of the arena's brightest-shining knights into a novel. Nearl, who was exiled but returned to reclaim her laurels, occupies a considerable portion of its pages.
relics.usage: Operators have +70% ATK for 6 seconds after dodging

relics.name: 'The Return'
relics.desc: This Kazimierzian best-seller is said to be a collective creation by fans. 'Nearl' has already become an amalgamation of many ideals and fantasies. 'For her, exile was not an escape. She came back, and stood alone against the era's torrents.'
relics.usage: Operators have +130% ATK for 6 seconds after dodging

relics.name: Lakebed Aegis
relics.desc: Three decades ago, a child dropped his toy wooden shield into the lake. Three decades later, he bores through the frozen lake, retrieves his shield, and embarks on a hero's journey.
relics.usage: Shield +1; all allied units gain Max HP +60% if you have any Shield at the start of a battle

relics.name: Empty Fowlbeast
relics.desc: The body is long since gone, but the soul remains in the shell for eternity. The unmelting creatures in the branches and leaves carry icicles as they spread their wings in the forest.
relics.usage: Summons have +30% HP, +30% ATK, and when on the field, grant +60% ATK to their summoners

relics.name: Living Woodplate
relics.desc: Shamans know the formidable will to survive that trees possess, so when a warrior has a similar will, they invite the trees to be their armor.
relics.usage: All allied melee units gain a Barrier equal to 50% of their Max HP on deployment

relics.name: Rock Horn
relics.desc: If you want to gather up manpower in Sami, blowing a trumpet is definitely the best way to do it.
relics.usage: An Operator gains ATK +20% for every Operator in the adjacent 4 tiles

relics.name: Ribbon of Honor
relics.desc: Numerous actors have played this character, yet none of them were able to save the character's dearest friend.
relics.usage: All allied units have +100% ATK when blocking only one enemy

relics.name: Chitinous Ripper
relics.desc: A more efficient way of growing an exoskeleton. It can tear prey apart, resist impact, and also be turned into a delicacy for its kin.
relics.usage: When a battle begins, a random Operator will have +100% ATK and +100% HP for that battle

relics.name: Medicine Sticks
relics.desc: Inspired by ancient Yanese soldiers who marched with something in their mouths to maintain silence, Mulberry created this edible hard plaster. Excellent for prolonged chewing and spirit lifting.
relics.usage: All allied units gain 2 layers of Shield when deployed

relics.name: Convalescence Access Card
relics.desc: A special service from the Convalescent Garden! Each Operator is entitled to one physiotherapy session from the Convalescent Garden before each of their field operations. Non-transferrable.
relics.usage: Operators gain +40 ASPD for 10 seconds after deployment

relics.name: Convalescence Premium Card
relics.desc: A special collaboration between Convalescent Garden and the Medical Department! Each Operator receives a comprehensive physical and psychological assessment, plus a physiotherapy session. Afterwards, they can enjoy Podenco's homemade flower cakes.
relics.usage: Operators gain +70 ASPD for 10 seconds after deployment

relics.name: Old George's Nutri-Paste
relics.desc: This poor-tasting fortified nutritional supplement was originally a 'dietary supplement' periodically provided to Columbian Pioneers, but after extensive marketing, it suddenly became a 'beauty product' beloved by nobles.
relics.usage: Operators gain ATK as their HP increases, up to +30% ATK at 100% HP

relics.name: Emergency Stimulant
relics.desc: An injection commonly used in Rim Billiton's local mines. Its strong active ingredient can stimulate the workers' senses and ensure their work efficiency in extreme environments. When life and their project both present their deadlines, sometimes the choice is simpler than one might think.
relics.usage: Operators gain ASPD as their HP decreases, up to +60 ASPD at 30% HP

relics.name: Timeworn Poetry Strips
relics.desc: 'Drunk far beyond all mounts that list the realm, all beings take on souls as they demand.'
relics.usage: Summons have +30% HP, +30% ATK, and will no longer use Deployment slots

relics.name: Familiar Sculpture
relics.desc: A familiar face but a different vibe. Perhaps you have met this person?
relics.usage: All enemy units have -15 ASPD

relics.name: 'Painful Happiness'
relics.desc: Oripathy is spreading among the troupe members. Some collapsed, some broke out crying, some were overjoyed, and some turned their attention to writing. It was at such a time that the young man received his coming-of-age present. He will sing his very last song as an actor.
relics.usage: All enemy units have -15% HP and Movement Speed

relics.name: Dawn of Literature
relics.desc: 'Aqqam Naqqun Sarqqam. That is 'Amnannam', the one and only curse, the uttering that kills even those who have yet to hear it. Now weep!'
relics.usage: Deals 50% more physical and Arts damage to [Sarkaz] enemies

relics.name: Gravity Defying Machine
relics.desc: Nasti Lunorey's magnum opus lifted the Sarkaz from the land that had tormented them for thousands of years. Now, though they float in ethereal clouds, they remain firmly rooted in the sky.
relics.usage: All enemies have -2 Weight

relics.name: Halo
relics.desc: 'When I entered that door, my elder brother had already sprouted a halo and wings of light. As he turned around and greeted me, his words were like a key, freeing me from the suffering in my heart. And then, I responded aloud, the halo completely connected, and I received my revelation.'
relics.usage: All [Sarkaz] enemies have -30% Movement Speed

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Advancement
relics.desc: Plant a great stone within the waters. Split the waves and part the fog.
relics.usage: Vanguard Operators have -2 DP Cost and +60% HP

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Burst
relics.desc: He's already done all the reserve squad's work for them. What else do you expect?
relics.usage: Vanguard Operators start with +15 SP

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Proficiency
relics.desc: As operators who are often the first to head into battle, what they have been through is unfathomable.
relics.usage: The SP Cost of Vanguard Operators' skills is decreased by 35%

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Mastery
relics.desc: 'When the darkly-clad enemies rushed towards me, there were only four words on my mind — they are done for.'
relics.usage: Vanguard Operators have +50% ATK and DEF

relics.name: Bend Spears - Advancement
relics.desc: The soldiers stepped onto the battlefield, drew their blades, and met in battle.
relics.usage: Guard Operators have -3 DP Cost and +40% HP

relics.name: Bend Spears - Acuity
relics.desc: 'This is the 7th blade you've broken this month.' 'But I cut down eight enemies this month.'
relics.usage: Guard Operators have +25% ATK

relics.name: Bend Spears - Bloodbath
relics.desc: Soldiers who get bolder as time passes are rare. Most need some form of psychological counseling to alleviate the trauma of war.
relics.usage: Guard Operators restore 2 SP after each attack

relics.name: Bend Spears - Deathmatch
relics.desc: I wouldn't really recommend learning those skills from Blaze.
relics.usage: Guard Operators have -40% DEF, but gain +40% ATK and +30 ASPD

relics.name: Iron Guard - Advancement
relics.desc: The shieldbearers formed a mountain range and became the earth. What they fight against are not enemies of flesh and blood. They fight against fate and injustice.
relics.usage: Defender Operators have -3 DP Cost and +40% HP

relics.name: Iron Guard - Invasion
relics.desc: Defensive actions for the sake of teammates or strategic purposes often make people forget about their original aggressiveness.
relics.usage: Defender Operators have +60% ATK

relics.name: Iron Guard - Consolidation
relics.desc: No matter how heavy fate's blow is, take it.
relics.usage: Defender Operators gain HP +40%, DEF +40%, and RES +20

relics.name: Iron Guard - Impenetrable
relics.desc: Every blow they endure will turn into anger and be returned severalfold.
relics.usage: Defender Operators restore 2 SP after being attacked

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Advancement
relics.desc: Load, aim, and fire. Destruction arrives as scheduled.
relics.usage: Sniper Operators have -2 DP Cost and +60% HP

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Precision
relics.desc: In an era when Originium Arts were not as robust as they are now, Yan had a saying, 'a pierced willow leaf from a hundred paces,' to praise others for their mastery of archery.
relics.usage: Sniper Operators have +20% ATK

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Crossfire
relics.desc: The dense crossfire also exposes snipers to great danger. The next battle boils down to a game of vision.
relics.usage: Sniper Operators have -40% HP, but gain +40% ATK

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Divine Speed
relics.desc: It is said that the legendary archers of ancient Victoria could almost shoot a continuous stream of arrows.
relics.usage: Sniper Operators have +70 ASPD

relics.name: Broken Wand - Advancement
relics.desc: Let Arts dance around your fingertips. Call the wind and rain, unravel reality, and achieve your grand goals.
relics.usage: Caster Operators have -3 DP Cost and +60% HP

relics.name: Broken Wand - Arts Weaving
relics.desc: Those who gaze up at the great spires of Leithanien often see strange or even celestial phenomena.
relics.usage: Caster Operators have +25% ATK and +25 ASPD

relics.name: Broken Wand - Concentration
relics.desc: 'When a caster intends to go all out, they will display a completely different temperament — even if we're talking about something like Skyfire's grumpiness.'
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Caster Operators by +0.4/s

relics.name: Broken Wand - Malediction
relics.desc: It is virtually impossible to identify when the Sarkaz first encountered Originium, and the origins of these ancient Arts have long been separated from actual reality and common sense.
relics.usage: Caster Operators have -40% HP, but deal +70% Arts damage

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Advancement
relics.desc: Whenever you're 'almost done' with a task, what you need at that moment is someone to help you with the 'almost' part.
relics.usage: Supporter Operators have -2 DP Cost and +60% HP

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Diligence
relics.desc: Operators tend to give it their all, even to tasks that might seem trivial. The reality is, those tasks are not trivial at all.
relics.usage: The SP Cost of Supporter Operators' skills is decreased by 40%

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Assistance
relics.desc: Proper meals, correct paths, or simply having a heart-to-heart... Victory is won through these little things.
relics.usage: Allied units within the attack range of Supporter Operators gain +20% ATK

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Counter-Arts
relics.desc: There are many ways to weaken an enemy's defensive capabilities: positional devices, armor-stripping Arts, marking weak points, and... giving them a stomachache.
relics.usage: Enemies within the attack range of Supporter Operators have -20% DEF and -20% RES

relics.name: Healer's Path - Advancement
relics.desc: The desire to save lives is a virtue that mankind must applaud, for that is the support that keeps us alive.
relics.usage: Medic Operators have -2 DP Cost and +60% HP

relics.name: Healer's Path - Self-Treating
relics.desc: Who says healers can't heal themselves? They simply pop some pills before continuing to help others.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Medic Operators by +0.3/s

relics.name: Healer's Path - Keen Hands
relics.desc: Compared to snatching a life from the grip of death, what's three days of coma afterward?
relics.usage: Medic Operators gain +50 ASPD

relics.name: Healer's Path - Restore Sanity
relics.desc: Making one's body as solid as a nomadic city is a bit of a romanticized description, but our medics are ready to put that idea into practice.
relics.usage: Allied units within the attack range of Medic Operators gain Resistance

relics.name: Rusted Blade - Advancement
relics.desc: There may be many means, but only one end.
relics.usage: Specialist Operators have -2 DP Cost and +60% HP

relics.name: Rusted Blade - Execution
relics.desc: Endless rust to scrape, and a bottomless list of tasks to complete.
relics.usage: Specialist Operators have +30 ASPD

relics.name: Rusted Blade - No Man's Land
relics.desc: A shadow blinks, a faint sound stirs, and a life is taken. The audience is the next victim.
relics.usage: The Redeployment Time of Specialist Operators -35%

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Predation
relics.desc: The pack rumbles with hunger, waiting for a feast.
relics.usage: For every Vanguard Operator on the field, gain 1 DP every 3 seconds (Stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Bend Spears - Rending
relics.desc: Those with power can always help each other to success.
relics.usage: For every Guard Operator on the field, all allied units gain ATK +8% (Stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Broken Wand - Undulation
relics.desc: Tuned to the same frequency; together we'll play the melody.
relics.usage: For every Caster Operator on the field, all allied units deal +12% Arts damage (Stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Rusted Blade - Protraction
relics.desc: If the host does not want guests, they'll never reach the door.
relics.usage: For every Specialist Operator on the field, all enemies have -5% Movement Speed (Stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Rusted Blade - Lone Force
relics.desc: Solitude.
relics.usage: When there are no allies in the surrounding 4 tiles of a Specialist operator, they gain +70% ATK

relics.name: Hand of Buckler
relics.desc: Drop by drop, bit by bit. It is unstoppable.
relics.usage: Decel Binder, Hexer, and Abjurer Operators' attacks deal extra Arts damage equal to 3% of the target's current HP

relics.name: Hand of Predation
relics.desc: Herds stir, flesh rend asunder.
relics.usage: Pioneer, Charger, and Tactician Operators gain +10% ATK and DEF on every skill activation (Stacks up to 10 times); If you have Blunt Claws - Predation, also increases their SP regen rate by +0.5/s

relics.name: Hand of Rending
relics.desc: Mountains shatter, stones devoured.
relics.usage: Reaper, Soloblade, and Fighter Operators ignore 70% of the target's DEF; If you have Bend Spears - Rending, they also recover 2.5% of Max HP per second

relics.name: Hand of Undulation
relics.desc: Blasts conquer, the wake deafening.
relics.usage: Splash Caster, Chain Caster, and Mech-accord Caster Operators recover 2 SP each time they deal damage to an enemy unit; If you have Broken Wand - Undulation, they also gain +20 ASPD

relics.name: Hand of Protraction
relics.desc: Protracted battles, a home of carnage.
relics.usage: Ambusher, Merchant, and Geek Operators gain +25% ATK for every 30 seconds they remain on the battlefield (Stacks up to 5 times); If you have Rusted Blade - Protraction, maximum stack increases to 8

relics.name: Hand of Mystery
relics.desc: Mists part, the truth approaches.
relics.usage: Core Caster, Primal Caster, and Ritualist Operators gain +0.5/s SP recovery rate whenever they use a skill (Stacks up to 4 times)

relics.name: Hand of Rumble
relics.desc: Strikes land true, the earth trembles.
relics.usage: Artilleryman, Phalanx Caster, and Flinger Operators gain +15% ATK for every time they deal damage to the same unit, up to 150%; this bonus will reset if no damage is dealt for 5 seconds

relics.name: Antique Casting
relics.desc: 'Harken, the forge of the sky, awaits five earthborn metals'... Even though it can be used for all kinds of work, nobody understands its exact mechanism.
relics.usage: Immediately Promote 3 Operators (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Rusted Iron Hammer
relics.desc: 'Change is necessary, and we must do all we can to hasten the oncoming storm.'
relics.usage: Shop vendors charge -50% Originium Ingots for their goods

relics.name: Rhodes Island Tactical Transceiver
relics.desc: Hang in there, help's on the way.
relics.usage: Gain an additional choice when Recruitment Vouchers are dropped after battle

relics.name: Four-Leaf Clover Fossil
relics.desc: A symbol of luck that Magallan found in a place all but devoid of life. The rock has no doubt experienced many violent changes of the lands, but it survived, giving those who come across it a small bit of lingering hope.
relics.usage: Gain an additional choice when loot drops from a Wish Fulfilled node or after battle

relics.name: Three-Dimensional Art Display
relics.desc: Rhine Lab is often like this artwork: mysterious, sophisticated, and inscrutable.
relics.usage: Recover 7 Life Points and recover an additional 1 Life Point after each battle

relics.name: Golden Chalice
relics.desc: Saints, knights, and believers. All of them are madmen. Dear God, even the chalice itself is made of pure gold!
relics.usage: For each 5 Originium Ingots in possession, all allied units have +7 ASPD

relics.name: King's Crown
relics.desc: O Nameless Kings, may you continue to bless Iberia, even though your kingdoms are no more.
relics.usage: When Life Point is at 1, all allied units have +50% ATK, increased to +150% ATK if you have collected 3 or more King's Collectibles

relics.name: Cannot's Mark
relics.desc: Some are willing to do favors for Cannot to maintain good terms, while others deserve the same treatment from Cannot.
relics.usage: Gain 1 Hope whenever you buy an item at the Rogue Trader or make an exchange at Lost and Found

relics.name: Roundstone Altar
relics.desc: An offering made is returned with a reward. So simple it was, that people never questioned what they were sacrificing to.
relics.usage: Chance to permanently increase all allied units' ATK and DEF by 5% after a battle (Stacks up to 10 times)

relics.name: Ancient Tree Fruit
relics.desc: The children of Sami make their wishes into tree seeds and bury them in the snow. When the tree bears fruit, the first four are taken, and the smallest is left to the next generation for wish making. The rest are tributes to Sami for hearing their questions.
relics.usage: Immediately obtain 3 random trinkets

relics.name: Friston.P
relics.desc: Friston would certainly not miss out on an opportunity to explore the secrets of another predecessor civilization. Oh, but Closure didn't even consider making backups, so DON'T tell her about this!
relics.usage: Allied units permanently gain ASPD +5 for every Emergency Ops cleared (Stacks up to 15 times)

relics.name: Expeditioner's Field Pack
relics.desc: They always stuff their backpacks with survival supplies, then press forward with the determination and will to challenge the boundaries of the known.
relics.usage: Operators gain ATK +60% and Resistance for 15 seconds after recovering from a negative status

relics.name: Minoan Ode
relics.desc: 'Is there a feat more worthy of praise than an expedition into no man's land? Now, yes! Go forth into the north, and write the next chapter of your saga!'
relics.usage: Allied units permanently gain HP +5% for every Emergency Ops cleared (Stacks up to 15 times)

relics.name: Knight Lance Pro
relics.desc: Kazimierz Major lottery tickets with hard-to-get adverts for weapons printed on them.
relics.usage: Treasure Chests on the battlefield will drop more Originium Ingots

relics.name: Coin-Operated Toy
relics.desc: No idea why anyone would like a design like this, but its overall concept is indeed praiseworthy—Just insert a coin, and even a statue will start moving. There is nothing truer in this world.
relics.usage: For each 5 Originium Ingots in possession, all allied units have +3 ASPD

relics.name: Chivalric Commandments - New Edition
relics.desc: Taking solemn vows is a thing of the past. The spirit of modern knighthood requires more flexible displays. Go ahead and input your number in the communications device, and you too will be an honorary knight.
relics.usage: For each 5 Originium Ingots in possession, all allied units have +5 ASPD

relics.name: Secret HR Letter
relics.desc: '■■■ gave this to you? Guess there's no problem then.'
relics.usage: 6-star Operators cost -2 Hope to recruit, and every recruitment has a chance for all 6-star Operators to appear with a random promotion

relics.name: 'Bridge of Knowledge'
relics.desc: It is said you need only hold it, and its vibrations will lead you to the Liches' Temple of Knowledge. Is that really true? It stays silent. Those who fail to question it will indeed never reach those doors.
relics.usage: Every Inspirer used grants all allied units +5% HP (Stacks up to 10 times)

relics.name: Mercenary's Accessory
relics.desc: A small price to pay for pursuing perfection. Small because it hasn't really affected his reading and writing.
relics.usage: Grants a random Operator +5% ATK, DEF, and Max HP, plus an additional +5% after each perfectly cleared battle (Stacks up to 10 times)

relics.name: Children of the Walls
relics.desc: The Children of Soil and Stone carefully taught the ancient city of Kazdel how to toughen itself and protect its people behind its walls. With the advent of a protracted peace, it was broken into many little pieces and turned into amulets for adventurers heading into unexplored lands.
relics.usage: Operators deployed on the 8 tiles surrounding the Objective Point gain +2 Block and +50% Max HP

relics.name: King's New Lance
relics.desc: Beautiful wishes made in dire straits can bring hope, even if they are not necessarily the truth.
relics.usage: When Life Point is 1, all allied units have +50 ASPD

relics.name: King's Armor
relics.desc: There used to be many golden display cases placed before the palace gates and in the square, displaying all sorts of treasures to admire. But now, it hurts just to think about such sights.
relics.usage: Shield +3; converts all Life Points into Shield; Life Point -1 and Shield +1 after each battle

relics.name: King's Legacy
relics.desc: Grow up and face reality. Arm yourself with tenacity and confidence, while showing your friends tolerance and grace.
relics.usage: When Life Point is at 1, all Operators recover an additional 1 SP and 3% of Max HP every 2 seconds

relics.name: Personal Witchcraft Terminal
relics.desc: 'We use the name 'Teekaz witchcraft' to honor what our ancestors discovered during the uncivilized parts of our history. But today it has become a discipline permeating all of Terra, and our explorations and developments in this field are far from over.'
relics.usage: All Operators have +35 ASPD if you used an Inspirer as the battle started

relics.name: Primordial Vestige
relics.desc: The most significant change in these animals is the mutation they undergo after contracting Oripathy. Otherwise, their records have remained unchanged for countless years.
relics.usage: All Operators DP Cost -6 if you did not use an Inspirer as the battle started

relics.name: Disaster's Origin
relics.desc: The Sarkaz dug through the Targangils Prime Vein and Originium crystals spurted forth from Kazdel. Their fall was inevitable, so they wanted everything on this great land to be buried together with them.
relics.usage: All enemies take +20% Arts damage and +100% Elemental Injury

relics.name: Slave Hunter
relics.desc: After obtaining Nasti's designs, the Sarkaz put them to use in war right away. They flew into the sky, dominating the Ancients with waves of wrath, and the never-ending war entered a new stage.
relics.usage: Units that become Levitated, Weightless, or are shifted will take 50% more damage for 10 seconds

relics.name: Sarkaz King's Regal Rest
relics.desc: For those in this position, a peaceful sleep becomes eternal
relics.usage: All Operators gain +20% DEF and +10 RES at full Life Points

relics.name: Sarkaz King's Torn Banner
relics.desc: For those in this position, to struggle is to inevitably fall.
relics.usage: All Operators gain +30 ASPD at full Life Points

relics.name: Commander's Portrait
relics.desc: The portrait depicts a remarkable individual who made distrustful kings shake hands and soldiers who could not understand each other stand shoulder to shoulder. If she were alive today, Terra's unification might seem surprisingly plausible.
relics.usage: All allied units gain +10% ATK and Max HP, and an additional +20% in Dreadful Foe nodes

relics.name: Soul Binding Bone
relics.desc: The elder revenant made a cage with his own bones to seal his kin within, and then tracked down his revenant kin scattered across the land in this tattered husk.
relics.usage: For every Thought you have, all Operators gain +3% ATK

relics.name: Soul Furnace's Fuel
relics.desc: The bones were thrown into the furnace, sending flames bursting forth. The revenants entangle into each other, transforming all their lament, fury, serenity, and shame into the energy that keeps Kazdel moving.
relics.usage: For every Thought you have, all Operators gain +5% ATK

relics.name: Survivor Contract
relics.desc: A very long contract, in which every term and condition is the result of experience, leaving no room for chance or sentiment. Satisfy them all to be the final survivor.
relics.usage: At the start of battle, a random Operator gains +20% ATK and DEF, plus an additional +20% at the end of each battle

relics.name: Masterless Memories
relics.desc: As the elder tossed them into the furnace, some revenants finally remembered where they came from and their duties, and remade their oaths to their faith. Others unleashed a sudden slew of curses, magnifying the echoes of flames reverberating on the furnace walls.
relics.usage: Immediately obtain 5 Thoughts at most left behind from your last adventure

relics.name: Herr Hraaselsuher
relics.desc: Albrecht Von Musbeast, Graf of the Spire of Rosen und Horns, is at your service, pledging to bring you lost treasures and hidden wisdom! He asks only for an occasional share of the haul, saying they're for his wife and daughter.
relics.usage: Toil Limit +2 and chance to gain 1 Plan after combat

relics.name: 'Song to Make A Tenacious Mind'
relics.desc: The song tells of a Djall born with the ability to sense fear. She was candid with what she sensed, but everyone was still wary. She later honed her skills to defeat foes without this power, yet remained known as the 'Arch-liar'.
relics.usage: Every Inspirer used grants +1 Shield

relics.name: Anchor For Five Seconds Ago
relics.desc: A young Lich was fretting over occasionally forgetting an idea he thought of five seconds ago, so he created this anchor to set those fleeting inspirations in place. Afterwards, he seemed to have forgotten to use it.
relics.usage: Gain 1 extra Inspirer after the battle if you used an Inspirer as the battle started

relics.name: Personal Paintbrush
relics.desc: A haunted brush that compels its owners to paint with their own blood. The masterpiece mesmerizes beholders into adding another stroke the same way. Eventually, the elder revenant found the brush, along with many paintings, and sealed the rogue revenant in his bones.
relics.usage: Plans have -1 Toil

relics.name: Scales of Avarice
relics.desc: Merchants offered money, treasure, and even their lives and souls, but couldn't balance the scales to obtain the feather-light glow. The elder revenant crushed the scales with his soul and sealed the rogue revenant in his bones.
relics.usage: Gain +3 Originium Ingots for each non-combat node entered when Total Mental Toil exceeds 20

relics.name: Word-Carving Knife
relics.desc: Once the standard tool of Sarkaz stonemasons. It is said carving prayers on weeping spikes can calm the revenants' resentment. The knife is still sharp, but no one remembers the prayers.
relics.usage: and  have -50% DEF

relics.name: Thoughts Catcher
relics.desc: Sorting truth from falsehood takes time, and some ideas will invariably scatter. In such moments, professionally trained retainers will snatch those ideas up and turn them into true wealth.
relics.usage: Originium Ingot +1 after each interpretation

relics.name: Doodle of Hope
relics.desc: 'I'm a Teekaz orphan. My parents died in a Catastrophe, and it was my Feline neighbor who raised me and treated me as one of his own. I can say with a clear conscience that I am a descendant of the Ancients.'
relics.usage: Hope +3; Emergency Ops will no longer appear when refreshing nodes; triggers wondrous effects in Encounter nodes

relics.name: Talons of Hatred
relics.desc: 'A vampire killed my sister, a Nachzehrer took my papa, and mama escaped with me. I'll never compromise with the Sarkaz. They can repent when they're all gone.'
relics.usage: All allied units and enemies have +20% ATK; Emergency Ops will appear more often when refreshing nodes; triggers wondrous effects in Encounter nodes

relics.name: Burdenherd Bell
relics.desc: Whip it, and it will flee in terror; Pull on the reins, and it will resist. Ring the bell, hum a tune, and it will follow you to the ends of the land.
relics.usage: Burdenbeast Traveler joins your squad; gains an additional choice when loot drops from a Wish Fulfilled node

relics.name: Lamp of Wishes
relics.desc: 'I heard the Sarkaz can grant any wish, so I dug deep to find their secrets. It seems this was the start of their suffering.'
relics.usage: Originium Ingots +10, Wish Fulfilled will appear more often when refreshing nodes; triggers wondrous effects in Wish Fulfilled

relics.name: Rolling Ancestors
relics.desc: Oh great, the ancestors are here, and they want something more exciting...
relics.usage: All enemy units have ASPD +30, Movement Speed +30%, and Max HP +30%; can encounter a different Dreadful Foe in Border of Truth

relics.name: Blood Tax Mystery
relics.desc: 'Duq'arael ultimately failed. He stepped forward bravely, but did not manage to stop his brother Danso. The deep red chains then tethered all life on this land, so we now leave a trail of blood with every step we take. This blood tax is to repay the baseless debt we owe.'
relics.usage: All allied and enemy units have -35% Max HP; only active in Bizarre Fragments

relics.name: Crystal Mystery
relics.desc: 'The Rotproofers' descendants, called 'Ice Gargoyles,' complemented the Diαblos with their icy powers and cool heads, skillfully covering each other's flaws. But they were deceived by Kalnawdika and never resurfaced after going underground to stop the Black Flow.'
relics.usage: All low ground Operators have +600 DEF but are Frozen for 15 seconds after deployment; only active in Bizarre Fragments

relics.name: Suspicion Mystery
relics.desc: 'Duq'hraqaam openly questioned the Farchaser's caution towards the ruins and led his descendants underground. Prophecy foretold his demise by an 'ancient wound that refuses to heal' and that his descendants would call themselves 'Durin.' Their test tunnels would reach deep into the land's core, but no living soul would ever see them again.'
relics.usage: Earn double the Originium Ingots post battle, but also lose double the Life Points; only active in Bizarre Fragments

relics.name: Fabrication Mystery
relics.desc: The 'Great Deceiver' once visited this Place of Possibility. She enriched the scenery with vivid tales, invited Sarkaz to hear ancient stories, and left puzzles revealing historical insights if solved. Yet, people insisted the Djall Arch-liar spoke only lies, leaving the Sarkaz convinced that what they heard was mere fabrications.
relics.usage: Starting DP +50, but natural DP regeneration rate is reduced by 50%; only active in Bizarre Fragments

relics.name: Foresight Mystery
relics.desc: 'Lone eye, self-gouged; exile, a favor from the Liches. Mur'rannag endured this to prevent a future seen in visions. Since then, newborn Cyclopes started having two eyes like regular Sarkaz, but the prophecy was documented and would still come true.'
relics.usage: Gain +20% Command EXP from battles, extra enemies will appear in battle; only active in Bizarre Fragments

relics.name: Sigil Mystery
relics.desc: 'With the sovereign's approval, the Northwind Witch Qalaiša taught the Nachzehrers how to draw energy from the Eternal Hunt's rigid laws. To Nezzsalem, that was the start of his subjects surpassing nature with reason. His decision exceeded everyone's expectations, and the Nachzehrers continue to revere him as their liege after becoming Nachzehrer Beschützers.'
relics.usage: All Operators gain +30 Starting SP, but natural SP recovery rate is reduced by 50%; only active in Bizarre Fragments

relics.name: Tranquil Mystery
relics.desc: 'From the peak of Mount Anius to the heart of Lake Hyperion sit numerous monasteries of 'those without roots'. They work when their bells ring and rest otherwise. These bells seem to originate from the source of all things, and their rings resonate through eternity, beckoning all those seeking westward to turn back and ordering those sweeping eastward to lay down their arms. And thus, the nations of Victoria and Kazdel have enjoyed peace that lasts to this day.'
relics.usage: All allied and enemy units have -25% ATK, only effective in Bizarre Fragments

relics.name: Silk Bond Mystery
relics.desc: 'Lich Bertha was obsessed with other kinds of Sarkaz since childhood. On the very next day that she became a 'First Scribe', she forced a witchcraft contract with a test subject animal to unlock its intelligence, creating the 'Slugkaz'. Her silk threads remain hidden, afraid to face the other Liches.'
relics.usage: Operators take continuous damage if other Operators are within the 8 surrounding tiles; otherwise, gain +50 ASPD; only active in Bizarre Fragments

relics.name: Pledge of Babel
relics.desc: 'Babel' is directly led by two Kings of Sarkaz who have contributed greatly to the advancement of the military, technology, and medicine. Its initial, and also ultimate, goal is to eliminate war itself by any means necessary.
relics.usage: All Operators +3 DP Cost; leads expedition in a different direction

relics.name: Prophet Horn
relics.desc: It was neither guns nor blades that conquered the Elders and Ancients, but the Law. Soon, the significance of the word 'teekaz' transcended race, and Kazdel became home to all life.
relics.usage: Nodes will turn into Prophecy when refreshed; not active in Bizarre Fragments

relics.name: Ten Rings
relics.desc: Amiya hoped to change the land with her own power rather than relying on the King of Sarkaz. She refused their kindness and journeyed through Terra's nations with unmatched resilience and resolution, saving lives and calling for peace until Oripathy claimed her life.
relics.usage: Shadows of the Lord -50% Max HP

relics.name: Time and Light
relics.desc: The first mad howl that awakened the Law.
relics.usage: Epochs will occur more often, and Thoughts have +1 Toil; leads expedition in a different direction

relics.name: Petal
relics.desc: Epiphany.
relics.usage: -50% Command EXP and Originium Ingots from battles; triggers wondrous effects in Face-Off

relics.name: Anasa's Karma
relics.desc: His nature has changed and his sword lies shattered, yet the crystals on his body are an eternal reminder that his spirit still needs honing.
relics.usage: Leader and Elite enemies have +50% max HP; Dreadful Foes in Border of Truth will be more difficult; leads expedition in a different direction

relics.name: Prophetic Image
relics.desc: You must have heard this before: 'I see you, black crown on your head, melting millions of lives, into nothing but memories.'
relics.usage: Finale Cadence will appear in battles

relics.name: Endless Key
relics.desc: Through your torrent of inspirations, a story takes shape from nothingness. Through your exhausted imagination, Amiya will put an end to everything. Can your thoughts become a weapon to resist her?
relics.usage: Leads expedition in a different direction

relics.name: Framework of The End
relics.desc: Catastrophes and war, as far as the eye can see. When help cannot stop death, when medical treatment becomes only an accomplice to hatred, Amiya carries on with the only option left: the futile, mechanical act of 'saving lives'.
relics.usage: All Operators have +2 DP Cost; all enemies take 20% less Physical and Arts damage

relics.name: Body of The End
relics.desc: Amiya looks sadly at the person before her, sealed within the 'cocoon'. Frozen in place, they will no longer feel pain, nor will Originium cut their life short. She was unwilling to recklessly use her newly awakened powers, but now... there is no other choice.
relics.usage: All Operators have +2 DP Cost; all enemies take 20% less Physical and Arts damage and gain 20% ATK

relics.name: Reality of The End
relics.desc: Everything has been sealed into the 'cocoon', and now time flows only for Amiya. She will seek a panacea for all afflictions—physical or mental, she wants to cure them all. An absolutely lonely and endlessly long journey stands before her. She has already set off.
relics.usage: All Operators have +2 DP Cost; all enemies take 20% less Physical and Arts damage and gain 20% ATK; extra enemies will appear in the last battle

relics.name: 'Glory Pack'
relics.desc: A special betting method set up by the organizers for the knight competition season. Diversify your bets with various plans to minimize losses on any match.
relics.usage: When an allied unit is defeated, all enemies in the four adjacent tiles are stunned for 6 seconds

relics.name: Rainbow Jar
relics.desc: Usually placed by the Sami people where rainbows fall then carefully preserved, it is used to ward off unpredictable catastrophes, both natural and man-made.
relics.usage: Whenever an enemy enters the Objective Point, the Redeployment Time of a random Operator waiting to be re-deployed is reduced to 0

relics.name: 'Devilbane Banner'
relics.desc: Made by Sarkaz mercenaries loyal to Iberia, and used to kill Sarkaz mercenaries loyal to Leithanien. Many years later, Sarkaz mercenaries loyal to Victoria picked it up and gave it its name.
relics.usage: Operators recover 2 SP when dealing damage to [Sarkaz] enemies

relics.name: Holy City's Embrace
relics.desc: 'O holy Kazdel! May you bless my bullets as you have blessed our eternal covenant; may you bridge my gun to my target just as you have bridged the Sankta and the Sarkaz!'
relics.usage: Takes 35% less damage from [Sarkaz] enemies

relics.name: 'Little Cube'
relics.desc: The Liches' vessel, capable of transcending time and space, proves even more durable in fantasies. Ermengarde spent a lot of time fixing it up.
relics.usage: All Allied units gain +10% Max HP, and an additional +80% in Face-Off nodes

relics.name: Great Banshee's Veil
relics.desc: The former Lord of the Banshees always seemed amicable, as if that were her only side... until she pulled out her bone pen, sang softly, and impaled agonizing wails into the minds of every intruder.
relics.usage: All enemies take +10% Arts damage and +50% Elemental Injury

relics.name: Fearless Blade
relics.desc: Before Kazdel's gates he stood, an impregnable bulwark. Gaulish artilleries, Leithanian casters, and Victorian Knights all took their shots at him. Yet, even when the gates fell and the coalition retreated, the Goliath did not yield an inch.
relics.usage: When the battle begins, the Operator with the highest DP Cost gains +50% ATK and DEF

relics.name: Arch Glyph
relics.desc: Since antiquity, Kazdel has been concealed within the northern wind and snow. Led by the Cyclopes, the Sarkaz jointly created this Foldartal seal with their psychic powers. In a pinch, place it on ice and snow to hide within the Feranmut beneath your feet, evading the 'enemy'.
relics.usage: For one time only, if you would fail any battle other than the final battle of the area or a Leader battle and are currently not in a Bizarre Fragment, you will enter a special Bizarre Fragment

relics.name: 'Civilight Eterna'
relics.desc: A small, black crown.
relics.usage: All enemies take +150% True damage

relics.name: 'Little Gran Faro'
relics.desc: An illumination device reverse-engineered from the Eye of Iberia. It can penetrate thick, dark clouds and temporarily repel powerful enemies.
relics.usage: Stuns all enemy units for 5 seconds every time an enemy unit enters the Objective Point

relics.name: 'Memories of The Shard'
relics.desc: 'Still impaled on Victoria's heart, it watches as the empire bleeds.'
relics.usage: Deals 5000 True damage to all enemy units every time an enemy unit enters the Objective Point

relics.name: HR Bronze Seal
relics.desc: Emblem assigned to specific Operators when ■■■ receives an emergency deployment command. Your receipt of it signifies that ■■■ has completed the assignment.
relics.usage: Recruit a random 5-star Operator that is automatically Promoted

relics.name: Doctor Silver Seal
relics.desc: Emblem that you instructed to be sent out at the right time before you left. Your selected Operator has joined the field mission at the camp, while handing it back to you the way you left it.
relics.usage: Recruit a random 6-star Operator that is automatically Promoted

relics.name: Gul'dul's Silence
relics.desc: He stood at Kazdel's highest point and turned to stone. The Elder Hegemons retreated upon witnessing his black crown, while the Sarkaz rejoiced. This spectacle they named 'King of Sarkaz' endured for a long time—until the day the Sarkaz forgot their King, and pushed the statue down with their own hands.
relics.usage: All enemies gain +3000 DEF, but lose 100 DEF upon taking damage (Stacks up to 30 times)

relics.name: Qui'sartuštaj's Promise
relics.desc: With every changing generation, he promised his people and his carriers he would change the status quo for the Sarkaz. Within the layers of amassed hope and trust, he placed the crown on the ring-shaped structure, and knocked on the gates to the starry sky.
relics.usage: All 5-star and above Operators cost +1 Hope to recruit and promote

relics.name: Balor'sača's Arrogance
relics.desc: Lava obediently followed Balor'sača's army and spread across the land. They cared not for the Elder Hegemons, nor for their fellow Sarkaz. This land belongs to the Diαblo, and there is no need for others. As their King, Balor'sača absolutely cannot allow the crown to fall on the head of another.
relics.usage: Elite and Leader enemies gain +20% HP, DEF, and ATK

relics.name: Yliš's Ravings
relics.desc: Alas, the poor man. He could not comprehend the crown's power, and became a puppet. He was no longer his humble self, and lost the will to speak his own words. He became the first sacrifice to the crown's awakening.
relics.usage: All Operators start with -20 SP

relics.name: Shard of the Untold Kings
relics.desc: A guardian of the Temple of Knowledge uses their phylactery to unveil the mysteries of life, a crazy Sarkaz mercenary saddles a revenant to sow chaos, a vexing Beast Aristocrat establishes a commercial empire with the furnace, an ancient Feline wears the crown and subdues her own creator... Many stories remain folded within thoughts, waiting to be told.
relics.usage: Loadbearing Operators have -30% ATK

relics.name: Judgement: Guard
relics.desc: Faced with the revenants' myriad mysteries, the Guards brandish their weapons and cut a path.
relics.usage: For every Bizarre Fragment Collectible owned, Guard Operators gain +20% ATK and +20 ASPD

relics.name: Judgement: Vanguard
relics.desc: Faced with the revenants' myriad mysteries, the Vanguards take the lead and charge in.
relics.usage: For every Bizarre Fragment Collectible owned, Vanguard Operators gain +20% ATK and +30% Max HP

relics.name: Judgement: Defender
relics.desc: Faced with the revenants' myriad mysteries, the Defenders prepare their defenses and steadily advance.
relics.usage: For every Bizarre Fragment Collectible owned, Defender Operators gain +20% DEF and +30% Max HP

relics.name: Judgement: Sniper
relics.desc: Faced with the revenants' myriad mysteries, the Snipers adjust positions and unleash their firepower.
relics.usage: For every Bizarre Fragment Collectible owned, Sniper Operators gain +20% ATK and +20 ASPD

relics.name: Judgement: Specialist
relics.desc: Faced with the revenants' myriad mysteries, the Specialists swiftly drop in on key targets.
relics.usage: For every Bizarre Fragment Collectible owned, Specialist Operators gain +20% ATK and +30% Max HP

relics.name: Judgement: Medic
relics.desc: Faced with the revenants' myriad mysteries, the Medics treat the wounded and wait for the tides to shift.
relics.usage: For every Bizarre Fragment Collectible owned, Medic Operators gain +50% ATK

relics.name: Judgement: Caster
relics.desc: Faced with the revenants' myriad mysteries, the Casters release their Arts to deconstruct them.
relics.usage: For every Bizarre Fragment Collectible owned, Caster Operators gain +20% ATK and +20 ASPD

relics.name: Judgement: Supporter
relics.desc: Faced with the revenants' myriad mysteries, the Supporters break the mold and offer their unique ingenuity.
relics.usage: For every Bizarre Fragment Collectible owned, Supporter Operators gain +50% ATK

relics.name: Hand of Fireworks
relics.desc: Bang! Boom! A pleasant surprise.
relics.usage: Marksman, Loopshooter, and Sentry Protector Operators have a 25% chance on each attack to shoot an extra projectile, dealing 200% ATK as AoE Physical Damage

relics.name: Clotheskaz
relics.desc: The Clotheskaz community thrives on the fierce competition among the creatures that wear them.
relics.usage: Operators immediately obtain 30 SP after their skill ends for the first time

relics.name: Unripe Yearning
relics.desc: These incomplete thoughts cling to their creators, zealously guarding them until they obtain their forms through a sudden revelation and embark on a long journey.
relics.usage: For every Thought you have, all Operators gain +3% Max HP and DEF

relics.name: Cursed Counterbeast
relics.desc: These bizarre beasts, born of falsehood, are drawn to fleeting flashes of odd thoughts. They devour wantonly, and when time shatters and paradoxes surge, they give birth to new cubs.
relics.usage: All Operators gain +5 ASPD; consumes 1 Inspirer after each battle to grant an additional 5 ASPD (stacks up to 10 times)

relics.name: 'Blossom'
relics.desc: After several attempts by Touch, nature briefly opens up to you.
relics.usage: All Operators recover 1 SP every time they take damage or Elemental Injury

relics.name: Surging Feast
relics.desc: We've known how to indulge since birth. Do not resist your desires. Submit to them instead.
relics.usage: All allied units receive +30% healing effectiveness and take -30% Elemental Injury

relics.name: Rhoder's Gate
relics.desc: This remodeled Portal binds two stories together, with the other end being Rhozdel—a safe haven for both Sarkaz and Infected.
relics.usage: Immediately recruit multiple Reserve Operators; at the end of each combat, the last deployed Operator will be sent to a Scout node

relics.name: Visage of Crowned Fates
relics.desc: Each King bears a unique fate and form.
relics.usage: Shield +3; converts all remaining max Life Points into an equivalent amount of Shield before reducing max Life Points to 1

relics.name: King of Sarkaz's Vessel
relics.desc: For those in this position, prosperity is but an illusion.
relics.usage: All Operators gain +80% Max HP when Life Points are full, increased to 200% if you have collected 3 or more King of Sarkaz's Collectibles

relics.name: Expunger of Hatred
relics.desc: This weapon was forged by those unwilling to be blinded by hatred. It reveals a path: When the fear born of violence overpowers all hatred, then maybe, there exists a glimpse of the first light of peace.
relics.usage: +5 Mental Toil; if Deathmatch is used in a perfect clear, obtain a Deathmatch after the battle

relics.name: Baby Djall
relics.desc: 'Oh, my little cutie-pie! Enough tickling my head, alright?'
relics.usage: +3 Hope, obtain an extra +8 Hope when this Collectible is exchanged in Lost and Found

relics.name: Eye of Fortune
relics.desc: A millennium after the Sarkaz vanished, the saying 'the eye of a Cyclops opens for wealth' became folklore. People began worshipping discs with a single embedded eye, seeking wealth and happiness.
relics.usage: Originium Ingots +5, Operators dispatched in Scout nodes will return with 5 extra Ingots

relics.name: Wondrous Graffiti
relics.desc: The Liches often add a few more strokes to these pieces of 'street art'. According to them, it is mostly an economical way to bolster the city streets' defenses.
